en.title: SC: Evo 1.18
highlights: Mission 5 is now available during the progression

es.title: SC: Evo 1.18
highlights: La misión 5 ya está disponible en el modo de progresión
Se han ajustado varias condiciones de los logros

cards.title: Campaign Update 0.3.1
cards.excerpt: We're continuing the updates and additions to our internal systems to expand the selection of custom features as well as the upcoming gamemodes we have in store.

en.title: SC: Evo 1.18
en.excerpt: This much-belated patch is the first of the year 2026! We are grateful to be able to publish content once again, and are excited to bring you this latest round of balance updates.

es.title: SC: Evo 1.18
es.excerpt: ¡Esta actualización, tan esperada, es la primera del año 2026! Estamos muy agradecidos de poder volver a publicar contenido y nos alegra mucho presentaros esta nueva ronda de ajustes de equilibrio.

announcement.message: Testing the announcement system during the Launcher testing
